title: fix: attribute Cloudflare Images transform failures
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Wraps Cloudflare Images binding input/output/body-read failures as attributed `HttpError` responses.
- Records the transform stage and stable `images.cloudflare.com` upstream host in error telemetry.
- Preserves the original runtime error message, including `Network connection lost`.
- Adds focused coverage for output and response-body failures.

Root cause: `wan-image-pro` failures remained hostless after Replicate prediction and download boundaries were instrumented, leaving the subsequent PNG-to-JPEG Images binding transform ambiguous.

Checks:
- `npx biome check --write gen.pollinations.ai/src/image/utils/imageTransform.ts gen.pollinations.ai/test/image/imageTransform.test.ts`
- `npx vitest run test/image/imageTransform.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `npm run typecheck`

gist.headline: The missing host found
gist.blurb: A few lost image-transform errors now leave a proper trail of pollen. The hive can tell when Cloudflare's PNG-to-JPEG step is the one having a moment.
gist.summary: Cloudflare Images binding input, output, and response-body failures in the image transform path now return attributed HttpError responses with the transform stage and stable images.cloudflare.com host, while preserving runtime messages such as "Network connection lost."
gist.impact: Maintainers can now distinguish wan-image-pro failures occurring during the Cloudflare PNG-to-JPEG transform from earlier Replicate prediction or download boundaries, making transform incidents faster to diagnose.
gist.visual_concept: Polli acts as a tiny detective in a cozy image-processing garden, following a dotted trail from a PNG flower through a Cloudflare-style pixel cloud to a JPEG jar. A CRT monitor robot displays the newly labeled host and transform stage, representing errors that now carry useful attribution instead of disappearing into an ambiguous boundary.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polli, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and a tiny detective hat, tracing a dotted path from a PNG code-flower through a soft pixel cloud into a labeled JPEG jar while a chunky CRT monitor robot displays "images.cloudflare.com" and "TRANSFORM" in simple pixel text. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint-lavender-cream gradient background, code-plants and small flowers, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike, nostalgic but beautiful.
